title: Lesson 44
paragraph: This lesson focuses on practical B1 vocabulary for everyday communication.

words.meaning: money that you owe to someone
words.example: He worked hard to pay his debt.

words.meaning: the distance from the top to the bottom of something
words.example: The depth of the pool is two meters.

words.meaning: a very dry area with little rain
words.example: Very few plants grow in the desert.

words.meaning: a person who drives a vehicle
words.example: The driver stopped at the red light.

words.meaning: a kind action that helps someone
words.example: Can you do me a favor and open the window?
Her fear of heights made the bridge difficult.
The heat in August can be dangerous.

words.meaning: one thing in a list or group
words.example: The most expensive item on the menu is fish.

words.meaning: a very short period of time
words.example: Please wait a moment while I check.
The owner of the cafe knows every customer.
